# Olivier Cornelis

> Psychiatry resident and self-taught developer / data scientist based in Paris, France. This site is his academic and personal portfolio, available in English and French.

## Main pages (English)

- [About]({{ site.url }}/en/about): Background, training, and clinical and technical interests.
- [CV]({{ site.url }}/en/cv): International curriculum vitae.
- [Papers]({{ site.url }}/en/papers): Academic publications.
- [Projects]({{ site.url }}/en/projects): Open-source software and data-science projects.
- [Tools]({{ site.url }}/en/tools): Small tools and utilities.
- [Contact]({{ site.url }}/en/contact): How to get in touch.

## French versions

Every page above has a French translation under {{ site.url }}/fr/ (for example {{ site.url }}/fr/about).

## Feeds and metadata

- [Atom feed]({{ site.url }}/feed.xml): Latest posts.
- [Sitemap]({{ site.url }}/sitemap.xml): All indexable URLs.
